title: Preparing Worms for the COPAS (Wormsorter)
author: Priota Islam
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfqbjmsn

steps.title: Wash the worms off the plates...
steps.instruction: Wash the worms off the plates using few milliliters of M9 and collect in a 15ml falcon tube and fill up till 15ml with M9

steps.title: Centrifuge the tube at 1500rpm for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tube at 1500rpm for 2mins followed by removal of the supernatant using a pasteur pipette and addition of another 15ml of M9

steps.title: After the final wash remove the...
steps.instruction: After the final wash remove the supernatant as much as leaving behind 10ml in the falcon tube

steps.title: Consolidate all the worm liquid in...
steps.instruction: Consolidate all the worm liquid in a 50ml tube and dilute if necessary, for the COPAS

steps.title: Dispense the worms using the COPAS...
steps.instruction: Dispense the worms using the COPAS following the protocol COPAS wormsorter
